report.summary: Community growth cycle v4: identified crypto-tax-guide-2026 and ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide as top trajectory pages; drafted 7-post tax thread, Pectra tweet, DCA tool tweet, Discord announcement, and Thursday newsletter section; created 2 SVG social cards (calendar-urgency tax card + 3-EIP Pectra card) saved to /public/.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (7 posts): Crypto Tax Guide 2026 — hook on 31-day April 15 countdown, every taxable event explained (swaps/staking/airdrops), common misconceptions busted, 6 IRS forms mapped, tax-loss harvesting strategy with no wash-sale rule, CTA to /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026

Tweet: Ethereum Pectra Upgrade — EIP-7251 (validators 32→2,048 ETH, 90% fewer validators), EIP-7702 (EOA acts as smart contract, no migration), EIP-7691 (blobs 3→6, ~50% L2 fee drop), CTA to /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide
Tweet: DCA Calculator tool spotlight — 'Stop timing it' angle, no signup CTA, links to /tools/dca-calculator
Discord/Telegram announcement: both new guides (crypto-tax + pectra) with slugs, 'no wallet needed' callout

Newsletter section (Thursday send): Subject 'April's coming for your taxes and your L2 fees' — market pulse ($71K BTC, $2,088 ETH), 2 new guides, DCA calculator + stablecoin payments worth-reading picks, degen corner on EIP-7702 practical implications

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-crypto-tax-guide-2026.svg — 1200×630 social card: April 2026 calendar with April 15 highlighted in red, 3 stat cards (8+ taxable events / 6 IRS forms / no wash-sale rule), topic tag pills (DeFi/NFTs/Staking/Airdrops/Mining), urgency badge '31 DAYS', brand gradient title. Saved to /public/

social-ethereum-pectra-upgrade.svg — 1200×630 social card: large decorative Ethereum diamond glyph, 3 EIP feature cards side by side (EIP-7251 purple/validator consolidation 64× stake, EIP-7702 cyan/smart EOA gas sponsoring, EIP-7691 green/~50% L2 fee drop), mainnet badge 'April 2026', impact tag row. Saved to /public/

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site is Day 15 — no Google Search Console data yet; trajectory model based on content quality, keyword intent, and timeliness signals
April 15 US tax deadline is 31 days out — crypto-tax-guide-2026 enters peak urgency window; this is the highest-leverage social content play this week
Ethereum Pectra mainnet (April 2026) is generating increasing search intent; timing for organic capture is now
278 pages live; PUBLISH_QUEUE empty — next build cycle will scaffold new pages before next publish
